purpose: Per-parser-family AST-shape contract for the SystemVerilog preprocessor grammar. Same default-build gating as `systemverilog_v1.json`: the parser is on-demand-only and the cfg `has_generated_systemverilog_preprocessor_parser` stays off in default builds.
doctrine: First run after the parser becomes available may hit a regression-lock failure because `current_content_kind` is a placeholder. Update on first calibration.

samples.name: single_define
samples.drift_tracked_in: PGEN: SV-preprocessor per-family contract calibration on first parser availability + regen coordination follow-up
